rationale: The citing paper focuses on L1/L2 rating-scale anchor intensity in emotion measurement, while the cited paper examines script-dependent auditory/visual ad-processing and recall effects; this indicates only a broad shared bilingual-language context, not an obvious direct method/theory dependency from the notes alone.
